articles.author: Nicholas Vinocur
articles.title: How two wars are pulling Europe and the US apart - politico.eu
articles.description: The EU is worried President Trump could abandon Ukraine if the bloc doesn’t support him in the Middle East.
articles.content: It’s easy to see why EU leaders are so anxious. In recent days Trump has repeatedly blasted them for failing to do more to help him unblock the Strait of Hormuz, the shipping route used by about 20 p… [+1480 chars]
